source: captured from a gpt-5.4-mini test-criterion trial (compiles, fails red against unfixed code) - see BENCHMARKS.md
usage: For implement-criterion benchmarking: copy test-debug-redaction.rs over target_file in the worktree before running the block, so the worktree starts in the same state run_test_for_criterion would have left it in. qualified_test_name is the --test-file-equivalent green-check target; target_file is also the protected_paths entry run_implement_for_criterion needs.
